title:
Aerial Assisted Trophy Hunting Boundary Data Set
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Aerial Assisted Trophy Hunting Boundary Data Set
Seeking a KML file for the AATH boundaries for the use on a moving map.
Better compliance with AATH requirements.
Providing the ability to overlay the dataset onto a GPS device rather than using a PDF printout.

### Response from Department of Conservation
Status Request received
Comments A request to generate the KML file has been submitted to our GIS team. The standard turnaround time is 30 working days but may be provided sooner. As soon as it is available to me, I will submit the file or provide an update if there is an issue.

#### Likely Source Agency
Department of Conservation
